id: Dani Josie SUCKERPUNCH Spring Tour-San Fran, Wellington-San Fran
name: Dani Josie SUCKERPUNCH Spring Tour
long_description:
After dropping Go Go Go, Lovebomber, and her hottest single yet SUCKERPUNCH, pop-punk artist Dani Josie is headlining her first-ever nation wide tour.  

Pop anthems, high energy, happy and sad tears. Dani’s ready to bring her world to the stage joined by special guest Emerson. Expect to sing your heart out in an exciting night in a city near you.
description:
After dropping Go Go Go, Lovebomber, and her hottest single yet SUCKERPUNCH, pop-punk artist Dani Josie is headlining her first-ever nation wide tour.

Dani’s ready to bring her world to the stage joined by special guest Emerson.
Expect to sing your heart out in an exciting night in a city near you.

id: Messie-San Fran, Wellington-San Fran
name: Messie
long_description:
One of NZ’s most exciting DJs, MESSIE brings her high-energy, genre-blending sets to Auckland & Wellington this September for her 'All Night Long' Tour!⁠

 

Live Nation Presale: Wed 2 Jul, 11am⁠

General On Sale: Fri 4 Jul, 12pm⁠

All times local.

 

Looking for Accessible tickets? All accessible tickets need to be purchased directly by the ticketing agent’s accessible hotline or form. Have further accessible queries? Contact us at https://livenation-au.zendesk.com/hc/en-au

id: Freak Slug-San Fran, Wellington-San Fran
name: Freak Slug
long_description:
Manchester based musician Freak Slug - the project of Xenya Genovese - will be welcoming audiences in Pōneke Wellington and Tāmaki Makaurau Auckland into her dreamy indie-pop world this October.

 

LIVE NATION PRESALE: To access Live Nation presale tickets, create a free account. When presale begins, log in and click "Buy Tickets". No code needed.

 

ACCESSIBILITY: All accessible tickets need to be purchased directly by the ticketing agent’s accessible hotline or form. Have further accessible queries? Email us at accessibility.aunz@livenation.com.au.

id: Amble The Reverie Tour-San Fran, Wellington-San Fran
name: Amble The Reverie Tour
long_description:
ALL AGES EVENT

Critically acclaimed Irish folk outfit Amble will return to Australia in February 2026 for a string of headline shows, celebrating the release of their highly anticipated debut album, Reverie. Reverie captures the essence of Amble’s signature style — raw authenticity, heartfelt storytelling, and melodic intimacy, wrapped in warm acoustic instrumentation and ethereal vocal harmonies. Recorded live across studios in Ireland and Los Angeles, the album reflects the spirit and simplicity of the band’s early days.

 

Looking for Accessible tickets? All accessible tickets need to be purchased directly by the ticketing agent’s accessible hotline or form. Have further accessible queries? Email us at accessibility.aunz@livenation.com.au
description:
